title: D2C customer acquisition cost out of control
pain_description: Meta/Google CAC 2-3x post-iOS14.5; contribution margin flipping negative; panic.
santifer_pattern: Attribution + LTV models + LLM channel-mix optimizer + creative loop

title: D2C inventory forecasting: stockout vs. overstock
pain_description: Seasonality + promos + viral moments wreck forecasts; capital tied in dead SKUs.
santifer_pattern: Sales + marketing + LLM forecaster + PO recommender + cash constraint

title: D2C returns fraud + wardrobing
pain_description: Customers buy-wear-return; fraud costs 5-10% revenue; identifying serial abusers manual.
santifer_pattern: Order + return history + LLM fraud scorer + policy enforcer

title: 3PL switching / fulfillment orchestration
pain_description: Multi-3PL for zone optimization; switching is heroic migration; SLA misses hurt.
santifer_pattern: Order-routing agent + 3PL APIs + SLA monitor + auto-rebalance

title: Amazon listing health + suspension prevention
pain_description: Policy changes weekly; listings suppressed; seller account suspended.
santifer_pattern: Listing audit + policy feed + violation detector + appeal agent

title: Amazon review management + Vine strategy
pain_description: Negative reviews tank ranking; handling ToS-compliant is art.
santifer_pattern: Review monitor + ToS-compliant response + Vine strategy optimizer

title: Amazon PPC: ACOS optimization
pain_description: Auto + manual + product targeting + SP/SB/SD. optimization = full-time job.
santifer_pattern: Sponsored data + LLM optimizer + bid agent + negative KW

title: Shopify theme optimization + dev backlog
pain_description: Theme tweaks queue with freelance devs; A/B tests slow; CRO ideas die.
santifer_pattern: Heatmap + GA + LLM CRO recommender + Liquid generator + A/B

title: D2C subscription retention + churn
pain_description: Cancel page = churn; pause/swap options ignored; LTV collapses.
santifer_pattern: Cancel attempt → LLM reason detection → personalized save offer

title: Shopify tech stack sprawl (30+ apps)
pain_description: 30 apps @ $20-500/mo; performance bloat; overlap hidden; audit rare.
santifer_pattern: App usage + overlap detector + kill list + migration agent

title: D2C product bundle + offer configurator
pain_description: Bundle logic brittle; BOGO/free-gift rules conflict; checkout bugs hurt AOV.
santifer_pattern: Inventory + margin + LLM offer optimizer + conflict resolver

title: D2C SMS marketing: compliance + creative
pain_description: TCPA compliance + opt-out + emoji + CTR. creative manual; compliance slip = lawsuit.
santifer_pattern: Customer segment + LLM copy + TCPA rule engine + send + measure

title: Klaviyo flows that don't break
pain_description: 30 flows; overlaps; customers get 5 emails/day; unsubscribes spike.
santifer_pattern: Flow audit + frequency-cap agent + personalization optimizer

title: User-generated content (UGC) sourcing
pain_description: UGC drives ads but sourcing, rights, filtering all manual.
santifer_pattern: Customer signal + ask agent + rights + asset library + variant tester

title: Influencer seeding + conversion tracking
pain_description: 1000 creators seeded; conversions unattributed; ROI unclear.
santifer_pattern: Seed CRM + UTM/link tracker + conversion attribution + gift agent

title: POS + online inventory sync for omnichannel
pain_description: Shopify POS + marketplaces + physical stores out of sync; oversells daily.
santifer_pattern: Channel feeds + LLM anomaly + auto-hold + restock alert

title: Wholesale order intake for D2C brands
pain_description: Buyers email POs as PDFs; re-keyed into Shopify; errors cascade; fulfillment wrong.
santifer_pattern: PO email + OCR + order creator + buyer comms

title: Retail media (Amazon, Walmart, Target) ad ops
pain_description: Each retailer has own ad platform; reporting fragmented; wasted spend.
santifer_pattern: Cross-retailer feed + LLM budget mixer + auto-bid + report

title: Shopify fraud + chargeback automation
pain_description: Shopify Protect thin; fraud orders bleed; chargebacks reactive.
santifer_pattern: Signal + LLM reason + auto-approve/hold + dispute evidence builder

title: DTC pre-orders + launch waitlist ops
pain_description: Waitlist → pre-order → conversion = chaotic spreadsheet + Klaviyo hacks.
santifer_pattern: Waitlist + segmentation + pre-order flow + comms agent

title: DTC international expansion: local payment + tax
pain_description: Local cards (iDEAL, Sofort, UPI) + tax (VAT, GST) + currency. launch delayed 6 months.
santifer_pattern: Country rules + payment + tax + localization + shipping orchestrator

title: Headless commerce stack complexity
pain_description: Headless = freedom + complexity; build-vs-buy debates; migrations stall.
santifer_pattern: Headless spec + AI generator + component library + deploy

title: D2C community / loyalty engagement
pain_description: Top fans need recognition; generic loyalty programs miss; Discord neglected.
santifer_pattern: Fan tier + personalized asks + LLM engagement + offline perks

title: D2C creator discount code fraud
pain_description: Codes leak to coupon sites; margin destruction; affiliate commissions mis-attributed.
santifer_pattern: Code distribution + usage monitor + LLM leak detector + revocation

title: E-commerce cart abandonment flows
pain_description: Default cart-abandon email: 3% recovery; personalization manual.
santifer_pattern: Cart + customer history + LLM message + channel (email/SMS) + timing

title: Post-purchase experience + upsell
pain_description: Thank-you → tracking → feedback → reorder. ops leaves upsell on table.
santifer_pattern: Order + shipment + LLM-personalized upsell + review ask

title: D2C returnless refunds decision logic
pain_description: Cheap items cost more to ship back than refund; manual decisions; inconsistent.
santifer_pattern: Cost calc + fraud score + LLM decision + refund agent

title: DTC CPG: retail replenishment forecasting
pain_description: POS data patchy; forecast rolls; out-of-stock at shelf.
santifer_pattern: POS feed + LLM anomaly + replen recommender + retailer comms

title: Food D2C: cold-chain + expiry management
pain_description: Perishables ship with ice packs; cold-chain logs; expired product disasters.
santifer_pattern: Temp sensors + expiry calendar + auto-discount + recall agent

title: Beauty D2C: regulatory + claims compliance
pain_description: FDA/MoCRA + efficacy claims review; ingredient law per market; launches stall.
santifer_pattern: Ingredient DB + claim scanner + jurisdiction rule + lab-assist

title: Supplements D2C: DSHEA + FDA warnings
pain_description: DSHEA limits claims; FDA warning letters come fast; CS responses risky.
santifer_pattern: Product spec + claim screener + response drafter + regulator monitor

title: DTC apparel: size/fit returns
pain_description: 30%+ returns from fit; sizing guides ignored; AI fit emerging but brittle.
santifer_pattern: Customer fit profile + LLM recommender + returns feedback loop

title: DTC pet brand: vet pass-through + compliance
pain_description: Rx products + vet authorization + state pharmacy rules; fulfillment complex.
santifer_pattern: Rx intake + vet verify + pharmacy routing + compliance log

title: Cross-border DTC: returns handling
pain_description: Returns cross borders = duties + delays; customer pays shipping; brand loses.
santifer_pattern: Return request + nearest consolidator + customs doc + refund

title: Shopify analytics data silo
pain_description: Shopify data limited; Triple Whale expensive; custom warehouse overkill.
santifer_pattern: Warehouse + LLM question answerer + custom metric

title: Wholesale showroom appointments + orders
pain_description: Showroom season = buyers walk in, write orders on paper, reps re-key.
santifer_pattern: Buyer iPad + SKU picker + voice-add + instant PO

title: Custom / made-to-order DTC (configurator)
pain_description: Product configurator tools clunky; quote-to-manufacture lag.
santifer_pattern: LLM config dialog + manufacture spec + quote + update comms

title: Dropshipper order-fulfillment sync
pain_description: Aliexpress to Shopify; tracking + ETAs broken; CS tickets pile.
santifer_pattern: Supplier tracker + LLM CS replier + ETA predictor

title: Live shopping / livestream commerce ops
pain_description: TikTok Shop / Whatnot / Talkshoplive. ops across each; inventory real-time breaks.
santifer_pattern: Live inventory lock + order capture + post-show fulfillment agent

title: Influencer gifting + storefront commissions
pain_description: ShopMy / LTK / affiliate links; brand+creator payouts messy; disputes.
santifer_pattern: Link generator + sale attribution + payout + dispute resolution

title: Private label Amazon brand sourcing
pain_description: Supplier vetting on Alibaba risky; samples slow; contracts in Chinese.
santifer_pattern: Supplier lookup + LLM risk score + sample workflow + contract translator

title: FBA inbound shipment + receiving issues
pain_description: Lost/damaged units in transit; Amazon rejects claims; reimbursement slow.
santifer_pattern: FBA data + anomaly + auto-case filer + follow-up

title: E-commerce CMS + PDP copywriting at scale
pain_description: Thousands of products; SEO descriptions + A+ content manual; stale.
santifer_pattern: Catalog + brand voice + LLM PDP gen + review loop

title: Direct-to-retail (DTR) buyer outreach
pain_description: Target / Sephora / Nordstrom buyers unresponsive; calls + LinkedIn ignored.
santifer_pattern: Buyer CRM + category fit + personalized pitch + follow-up agent

title: Kickstarter / Indiegogo campaign ops
pain_description: Backer comms + BackerKit survey + shipping. creators drown post-funding.
santifer_pattern: Backer SSOT + survey agent + shipping orchestration + update drafter

title: TikTok Shop seller operations
pain_description: Listings + creators + fulfillment across TikTok's tools + Shopify. chaos.
santifer_pattern: Catalog sync + creator matchmaker + order agent + analytics

title: Printify / POD operations + customer svc
pain_description: Printify/Printful errors; prints off-center; customer service manual.
santifer_pattern: Order + error detector + proof request + refund + supplier claim

title: Enterprise D2C (Nike/Lululemon-style) personalization
pain_description: Personalization stack (Bloomreach, Dynamic Yield) expensive; AI-driven variants thin.
santifer_pattern: CDP + LLM generator + A/B runner + personalization governance

title: Brand protection: counterfeits on marketplaces
pain_description: Amazon + eBay + Alibaba knockoffs; takedown process manual per platform.
santifer_pattern: Cross-marketplace scraper + LLM counterfeit classifier + takedown agent

title: Marketplace ASIN / SKU enrichment for B2B D2C hybrid
pain_description: Same SKU in Shopify + Amazon + Faire + retailers. each format different; enrichment manual.
santifer_pattern: Master SKU + LLM per-channel formatter + bidirectional sync
